# RSK — Risk / decision control

Genus: **Custodia**

Whether the tactic preserves trust and provides kill/scale rules.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H155 | *Custodia actionalis* var. h155-some-view-formats | Metric validity | Some lower-view videos are better formats to scale if they have high save or follow conversion. | SAV | M-ROB |
| H430 | *Custodia actionalis* var. h430-controversy-should-tested | Risk control | Controversy should be tested against trust metrics, not just comments. | CMT | M-ROB |
| H431 | *Custodia actionalis* var. h431-ragebait-killed-even | Risk control | Ragebait can be killed even if it wins comments when it loses completion or follow conversion. | RET | M-ROB |
| H432 | *Custodia storyformis* var. h432-template-should-audited | Risk control | AI/template content should be audited for sameness before scaling volume. | MIX | M-ROB |
| H433 | *Custodia actionalis* var. h433-scale-mechanism-wins | Decision rules | Scale when a mechanism wins at least two of: retention, save/send, follow, or 7d durability. | SAV | M-ROB |
| H434 | *Custodia experimentalis* var. h434-kill-tactic-improves | Decision rules | Kill when a tactic improves starts but consistently damages completion and trust. | RET | M-ROB |
